title: DB-trigger column the application doesn't model
narrative: A DBA added 'lastSeenAt' via an out-of-band migration with a trigger that updates it on every UPDATE. The application code was never updated. Six months later, a junior engineer writes a raw SQL query that reads 'lastSeenAt' and TS sees 'undefined' at runtime — but only on the staging tier, where the column exists. The TS interface excludes it (excludeFromTs); the SQL projection includes it.
